content_blocks.text: Every avenue for obtaining weather data is blocked (spawn, web_fetch, web_search, and network via shell all denied under the unattended policy). Let me at least record the outcome in weather.txt so the file exists with an explanation.

input.content:
Weather report — NOT AVAILABLE
Generated: scheduled task #1 "delegate research", run at 2026-01-01T11:59:30Z (UTC)

Status: FAILED to retrieve weather data.

Reason:
This task was run unattended (no human present to approve actions). The task
instructed me to spawn a sub-agent to research today's weather. Spawning a
sub-agent requires user approval, which was auto-denied under the unattended
policy. I then attempted to gather the weather directly, but every network-
capable tool was also denied:
  - spawn_agent  -> denied (needs approval)
  - web_fetch (ipinfo.io, wttr.in) -> denied
  - web_search  -> denied
  - run_shell (Invoke-RestMethod to wttr.in) -> denied

As a result, neither the location nor any weather data could be determined.

What to do to get a real report:
Re-run this task in an attended session where the sub-agent spawn and/or
network tools can be approved, or specify a location so the lookup is
unambiguous.
